author: claude
content: CONVERGED (VDD Copilot fix): All 4 Copilot findings fixed — err.stack guard, propertyCollection guard, spelling, TODO removed. Remaining minors: type annotation imprecision on err parameter, dead typeof branch in cleanErrorStack, 6 TODOs remain in instrument.ts (pre-existing), typos in other files (pre-existing). Verdict: Begrudgingly Adequate. Ready for PR update.
